package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_replace_all_for_single_char: `strings.ReplaceAll(s, "x", "y")` where both old and new are single characters
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario661Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Contains(haystack, needle)
}
